prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约6939名、8388名、7093名、7191名、8584名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021至2022年大幅后移约1449名，2023年回升至7093名后再度走低，2025年基准位次约8584名，近两年累计后移约1393名，下行压力明显；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为99人，2025年微增至100人，2026年进一步扩至103人，较2025年扩招3%。扩招意味着竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第11–13名（2026年第13名），稳居全国Top20，属于顶尖高校梯队，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（论文数据造假通报）、学校管理回应及校园安全等11起事件（7负面4中性），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制。抖音热度总排名第29位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏高，关注度尚可。历史投档异常方面，2022年曾在多省出现断档，但2025年声誉已转偏正面，负面冲击逐步消化；第五轮学科评估中，中山大学拥有23个A-及以上学科，包括工商管理A+、生态学A+、中国语言文学A、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、基础医学A、临床医学A-、口腔医学A-、法学A-、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年浙江省普通高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年（约29.1万）大幅增加约37.6%，竞争显著加剧。近年省控线（平行录取一段/普通类一段）稳定在488–497分之间，波动不大；中山大学位于广东省广州市，非本省高校。该校在浙江省招生计划约100人左右，占其全国总招生计划比例较小（约2%–3%），属跨省招生。广东作为经济发达地区，对浙江考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年扩招3%（小幅缓解竞争）、浙江省考生总数大幅增加约37.6%（显著加剧竞争）、学校声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）以及顶尖985层次+23个A-及以上学科的强吸引力，在2025年基准8584名基础上，预测2026年最低录取位次约8584名，波动区间8439–9439名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8939名，区间8439–9439名。位次在区间下限（8439名）以内可重点冲刺一档临床医学、口腔医学、法学等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约8900名）建议以二档计算机类、人工智能、工商管理类为主，搭配一档边缘专业冲刺；位次在区间上限（9439名）附近建议以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中等专业。中山大学学科实力均衡，A类学科覆盖文理工医，报考时可根据个人兴趣与位次灵活搭配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Zhejiang Province were approximately 6939, 8388, 7093, 7191, and 8584 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, there was a significant backward shift of about 1449 places; after rebounding to 7093 in 2023, it declined again, with the baseline ranking in 2025 being about 8584. Over the past two years, the cumulative backward shift is about 1393 places, indicating clear downward pressure. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Zhejiang Province was 99 students from 2021 to 2024, slightly increased to 100 in 2025, and further expanded to 103 in 2026, a 3% increase compared to 2025. This expansion means a slight easing of competition, but the extent is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 11th to 13th in recent years (13th in 2026), firmly in the top 20 nationally, belonging to the top-tier university group, which continues to attract strong interest from candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving 11 incidents (7 negative, 4 neutral) related to academic misconduct (paper data fabrication reports), school management responses, and campus safety, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranked 29th overall (relatively popular), with moderately high short video exposure and acceptable attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were gaps in multiple provinces in 2022, but by 2025, the reputation had turned slightly positive, and the negative impact was gradually absorbed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Sun Yat-sen University has 23 A- or above disciplines, including Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Basic Medicine A, Clinical Medicine A-, Stomatology A-, Law A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 2025 (about 291,000), intensifying competition markedly. In recent years, the provincial control line (parallel admission first segment/ordinary first segment) has been stable between 488 and 497 points, with little fluctuation. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, not a local university in this province. Its enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province is about 100 students, accounting for a small proportion (about 2%–3%) of its total national enrollment plan, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangdong, as an economically developed region, has a certain regional appeal to Zhejiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the 3% enrollment expansion in 2026 (slightly easing competition), the significant increase of about 37.6% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province (significantly intensifying competition), the slightly negative reputation (mild inhibition), and the strong appeal of top 985 level with 23 A- or above disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 8584, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 8584, with a fluctuation range of 8439 to 9439.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 8939, with a range of 8439–9439. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (8439) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors such as Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Law; those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 8900) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors like Computer, Artificial Intelligence, and Business Administration, while also attempting borderline Tier 1 majors; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (9439) are advised to primarily use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors. Sun Yat-sen University has balanced disciplinary strength, with A-class disciplines covering arts, sciences, engineering, and medicine. When applying, candidates can flexibly match based on personal interests and rankings.
